22:10 â March 23, 2022
Update to Bill Payment Remittance Processing (BPRP) Forms
We made minor updates to the following BPRP forms:
Application for Bill Payment Remittance Processing (BPRP), Form 2482
â We removed the Cancellation of a CCIN option from the Electronic Bill Payment Remittance Processing Information section of the form.
Bill Payment Remittance Processing Checklist, Form 2661
â We clarified Biller account number requirements and other financial institution requirements in the Business Member Assessment Section of the form.
Document Library
Status
Application for Bill Payment Remittance Processing (BPRP)
2482
We removed the Cancellation of a CCIN option from the Electronic Bill Payment Remittance Processing Information section of the form. To cancel BPRP arrangements, use the Letter of Direction â Bill Payment Remittance Processing Cancellation, Form 9310.
Revised
Bill Payment Remittance Processing Checklist
2661
We added the following clarifications to the Business Member Assessment Section:
To become a Biller, business members must issue a customer account number. The account number must be clearly displayed on the customer's invoice.
You must advise your business members that other financial institutions require a fax number for tracing purposes.
Revised
